mapper.select:
SELECT D.DEPT_CD, D.UP_DEPT_CD, UPD.DEPT_NM AS UP_DEPT_NM, D.DEPT_TYPE_CD, DT.DEPT_TYPE_NM AS DEPT_TYPE_NM, D.DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO, EH.EMP_NM AS DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NM, D.DEPT_NM, D.DEPT_LOC, D.DEPT_TEL, D.DEL_YN, D.REG_DTM, D.MOD_DTM FROM DEPT D LEFT JOIN DEPT UPD ON UPD.DEPT_CD = D.UP_DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN DEPT_TYPE DT ON DT.DEPT_TYPE_CD = D.DEPT_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN EMP EH ON EH.EMP_NO = D.DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO WHERE 1=1
AND D.DEL_YN = #{cond.delYn}
AND ( D.DEPT_CD LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR D.DEPT_NM LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR NVL(DT.DEPT_TYPE_NM, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR NVL(UPD.DEPT_NM, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR NVL(EH.EMP_NM, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR NVL(D.DEPT_TEL, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR NVL(D.DEPT_LOC, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' )
AND D.DEPT_CD LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%'
AND D.DEPT_NM LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%'
AND NVL(DT.DEPT_TYPE_NM, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%'
AND NVL(UPD.DEPT_NM, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%'
AND NVL(EH.EMP_NM, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%'
AND NVL(D.DEPT_TEL, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%'
AND NVL(D.DEPT_LOC, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%'
AND ( D.DEPT_CD LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR D.DEPT_NM LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR NVL(DT.DEPT_TYPE_NM, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR NVL(UPD.DEPT_NM, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR NVL(EH.EMP_NM, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR NVL(D.DEPT_TEL, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' OR NVL(D.DEPT_LOC, '') LIKE '%' || #{cond.keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY D.DEPT_CD

SELECT D.DEPT_CD, D.UP_DEPT_CD, UPD.DEPT_NM AS UP_DEPT_NM, D.DEPT_TYPE_CD, DT.DEPT_TYPE_NM AS DEPT_TYPE_NM, D.DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO, EH.EMP_NM AS DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NM, D.DEPT_NM, D.DEPT_LOC, D.DEPT_TEL, D.DEL_YN, D.REG_DTM, D.MOD_DTM FROM DEPT D LEFT JOIN DEPT UPD ON UPD.DEPT_CD = D.UP_DEPT_CD LEFT JOIN DEPT_TYPE DT ON DT.DEPT_TYPE_CD = D.DEPT_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN EMP EH ON EH.EMP_NO = D.DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO WHERE D.DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
SELECT DEPT_CD, UP_DEPT_CD, DEPT_TYPE_CD, DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO, DEPT_NM, DEPT_LOC, DEPT_TEL, DEL_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM DEPT WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DEPT ( DEPT_CD, UP_DEPT_CD, DEPT_TYPE_CD, DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO, DEPT_NM, DEPT_LOC, DEPT_TEL, DEL_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM ) VALUES ( #{req.deptCd}, #{req.upDeptCd}, #{req.deptTypeCd}, #{req.deptHeadEmpNo}, #{req.deptNm}, #{req.deptLoc}, #{req.deptTel}, 'N', SYSDATE, NULL )
mapper.update: UPDATE DEPT SET UP_DEPT_CD = #{req.upDeptCd}, DEPT_TYPE_CD = #{req.deptTypeCd}, DEPT_HEAD_EMP_NO = #{req.deptHeadEmpNo}, DEPT_NM = #{req.deptNm}, DEPT_LOC = #{req.deptLoc}, DEPT_TEL = #{req.deptTel}, DEL_YN = #{req.delYn}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE DEPT_CD = #{req.deptCd}
UPDATE DEPT SET DEL_YN = #{delYn}, MOD_DTM = SYSDATE WHERE DEPT_CD = #{deptCd}
mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_TYPE_CD, DEPT_TYPE_NM, USE_YN, REG_DTM, MOD_DTM FROM DEPT_TYPE WHERE USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPT_TYPE_CD
